rawAssistant: Can't help with that, traveler. My focus is on keeping Hollowfen safe and secure. The rain might've washed away some signs of trouble, but I'll be keeping a close eye out for any new developments. You'd best get moving – the fog's lifting fast, and I've got to make sure the delta stays in line.
